message:
Add Next.js web dashboard scaffold and update project metadata

Web dashboard (web/):
- Add Next.js project scaffold with package.json, next.config.ts,
  tsconfig.json for the web-based fleet monitoring dashboard
- Include jest.config.js and jest.setup.ts for component testing
- Add src/ and public/ directories with initial application structure
- Exclude .next/, dist/, and node_modules/ via .gitignore

Metadata:
- Update .gitignore with web/node_modules/, web/dist/, web/.next/
  exclusions
- Update Cargo.lock with minor dependency version adjustments
- Update beads issue tracker with Phase 6 task status changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+/** @type {import('jest').Config} */
+module.exports = {
+  testEnvironment: "jsdom",
+  transform: {
+    "^.+\\.(ts|tsx)$": [
+      "ts-jest",
+      {
+        tsconfig: {
+          jsx: "react-jsx",
+          module: "esnext",
+          moduleResolution: "bundler",
+          esModuleInterop: true,
+          paths: { "@/*": ["./src/*"] },
+        },
+      },
+    ],
+  },
+  moduleNameMapper: {
+    "^@/(.*)$": "<rootDir>/src/$1",
+  },
+};

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+import "@testing-library/jest-dom";

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "name": "vc-dashboard",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "private": true,
+  "scripts": {
+    "dev": "next dev",
+    "build": "next build",
+    "start": "next start",
+    "lint": "next lint",
+    "test": "jest --passWithNoTests",
+    "test:watch": "jest --watch"
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "next": "^15.0.0",
+    "react": "^19.0.0",
+    "react-dom": "^19.0.0"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@testing-library/react": "^16.0.0",
+    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.0.0",
+    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
+    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
+    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
+    "jest": "^29.7.0",
+    "jest-environment-jsdom": "^29.7.0",
+    "typescript": "^5.5.0",
+    "ts-jest": "^29.2.0",
+    "@babel/preset-env": "^7.0.0",
+    "@babel/preset-react": "^7.0.0",
+    "@babel/preset-typescript": "^7.0.0"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@ +"use client"; + +import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; +import { StatusBadge } from "@/components/StatusBadge"; +import { api, GuardianPlaybook, GuardianRun } from "@/lib/api"; + +export default function GuardianPage() { + const [playbooks, setPlaybooks] = useState([]); + const [runs, setRuns] = useState([]); + const [error, setError] = useState(null); + + useEffect(() => { + Promise.all([api.guardianPlaybooks(), api.guardianRuns()]) + .then(([pb, r]) => { + setPlaybooks(pb.playbooks); + setRuns(r.runs); + }) + .catch((e) => setError(e.message)); + }, []); + + return ( +

} + +

IDNameStatus

{r.id}{r.playbook_id} + + + {r.started_at} +

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "target": "ES2017",
+    "lib": [
+      "dom",
+      "dom.iterable",
+      "esnext"
+    ],
+    "allowJs": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "strict": true,
+    "noEmit": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "module": "esnext",
+    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
+    "resolveJsonModule": true,
+    "isolatedModules": true,
+    "jsx": "preserve",
+    "incremental": true,
+    "plugins": [
+      {
+        "name": "next"
+      }
+    ],
+    "paths": {
+      "@/*": [
+        "./src/*"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "include": [
+    "**/*.ts",
+    "**/*.tsx",
+    "next-env.d.ts",
+    ".next/types/**/*.ts"
+  ],
+  "exclude": [
+    "node_modules",
+    "dist"
+  ]
+}
